description:
You are a Financial Controller at a healthcare organization preparing for the fiscal year-end audit. In Snipe-IT (http://localhost:8000, login: admin / password), set up depreciation tracking and correct erroneous asset data from a prior migration.

Create the following depreciation schedules:
- "IT Equipment - Short Life": 36 months
- "IT Equipment - Standard Life": 60 months
- "Peripherals": 48 months

Assign the "IT Equipment - Short Life" schedule to the MacBook Pro 14", Dell XPS 15, ThinkPad X1 Carbon, iPhone 14 Pro, and iPad Air asset models. Assign the "IT Equipment - Standard Life" schedule to the Dell OptiPlex 7090, HP Z2 Tower G8, Dell PowerEdge R740, and Cisco Catalyst 9200 asset models. Assign the "Peripherals" schedule to the Dell UltraSharp U2722D, LG 27UK850-W, and HP LaserJet Pro M404dn asset models.

Update the following assets with corrected purchase information:
- ASSET-DEP001 ("Finance Laptop 1"): Purchase Cost $1,849.00, Purchase Date 2023-06-15
- ASSET-DEP002 ("Primary DB Server"): Purchase Cost $12,499.00, Purchase Date 2022-03-20
- ASSET-DEP003 ("Reception Monitor"): Purchase Cost $449.00, Purchase Date 2024-01-10
- ASSET-DEP004 ("Marketing Laptop 3"): Purchase Cost $2,199.00, Purchase Date 2023-11-01
